feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Global Hierarchy - Unable to load attributes on the node of the Global Hierarchy in SAP
entry.content:
We have a created a Custom Hierarchy type to maitain Investment classification Hierarchy. At the leaf we have attribute assigned which allows multiple values. 

Problem -

When we export this hierarchy Attributes with multiple values are not downloaded

When we import. Only nodes/leaf are uploaded., attributes are not uploaded

Can attributes with multiple values are allowed for import?

entry.title: ISO20022: Format switch from pain.001.001.03 to pain.001.001.09
entry.content:
As part of a migration to ISO 20022 (pain.001.001.09) in SAP (PMW/DMEE), we need to gradually switch existing payments to the new format.

Currently each company code uses about 10 Payment Methods which are actively used in F110.

We have old DMEE tree for pain.001.001.03 and we have a new one for pain.001.001.09.

The challenge is how to perform the switch:

  • Creating new (duplicated) Payment Methods with the new format is not very practical (a lot of configuration, changes in master data, and the Payment Method key is only 1 character).
  • Simply replacing the payment format in an existing Payment Method is risky because it would immediately affect all payments using that method.

What is the usual way to perform a phased and safe rollout of a new payment format in production?

Will be appreciated for ideas or real exampes.

entry.title: Need help on SAP system Administration Courses in SAP Learning Hub
entry.content: I want to learn SAP system Administration i.e Basis role. Pls suggest relevant courses from SAP learning hub. I have already completed SAP HANA DBA course and now want to focus on core SAP Basis Admin activities. Thank You.

entry.title: Cant we configure delete stock identification , remove only delete identification on storage type
entry.content:
Can't we configure delete stock identification, remove only delete identification on storage type.

its troughing error it allowing only final storage type.

Kindly help me to assist for this issue

Thanks and Regards,

Anjanna

entry.title: RC 12 Error during Client Import to MXQ 500 / QAS 500 (Reopened)
entry.content: Continuing: How to run CHECK_TABLE_CONSISTENCY in SAP HANA Studio

entry.title: Problem with the views of F2343 Manage Inspection Lots
entry.content:
At the operational level, views were created to facilitate their searches;

Then the operator enters a control batch to input the data.

Once finished, the operator returns to the home screen to process a second control batch. The user-created view does not apply.

entry.title: What business trend is currently having the biggest impact on your SAP projects?
entry.content: I feel like there’s always a new “big thing” everyone is talking about, lately it has been AI, clean core, cloud, UX… but I’m not sure all of them actually change what we do day to day. I wanted to ask if you really see a difference in your projects with all these trends. I mean, is there something that really made a difference?  Something that actually changed how you work, not just something that sounds good in presentations.

entry.title: SAP FI – Document Currency Not Zero but Local Currency Zero After FX Valuation and Manual Adjustment
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing a currency inconsistency issue in SAP FI (New GL) and would appreciate your guidance on the correct SAP-standard resolution.

 

System Setup:

Company Code Currency: EUR

GL: Contract Asset (non-open item managed)

Scenario:

 

During period-end, foreign currency valuation was executed (likely via FAGL_FCV or similar).

 

This resulted in postings where:

 

Local currency (EUR) was updated

 

Document currency for foreign currencies (NOK / HUF) remained zero or not relevant

 

Subsequently, manual adjustment entries were posted (via upload), where:

 

Document currency = 0 (in NOK / HUF)

 

Local currency (EUR) was impacted

 

Current Situation in GL (FAGLL03 view):

 

EUR (Document Currency): +77K

 

Local Currency (EUR): 0

 

NOK and HUF: negative balances contributing to local currency zero

 

So effectively:

 

GL is balanced in local currency

 

But not balanced in document currency (EUR)

 

Understanding So Far:

 

From my analysis:

 

The issue is caused by “local currency only” postings (document currency = 0)

 

This created a mismatch between document and local currency layers

 

My Questions:

 

Is it correct that SAP requires document and local currency consistency for proper clearing?

 

Is the only recommended solution to:

 

Reverse the incorrect NOK/HUF postings (where doc currency = 0)

 

Then repost correctly in EUR?

 

Is there any SAP-supported way to:

 

Adjust document currency (EUR) without reversing prior entries?

 

Or post corrective entries that align both currency views?

 

How does SAP technically allow postings where:

 

Document currency = 0

 

Local currency ≠ 0(e.g., FX valuation or certain uploads)

 

Goal:To bring the GL to:

 

Document currency = 0

 

Local currency = 0

 

No residual balances in NOK/HUF

 

Additional Info:

 

This GL is not open item managed

 

Issue originated from a mix of system FX valuation and manual uploads

 

Any guidance on SAP best practice or similar experience would be highly appreciated.

 

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Alternative Material Consumption in SAP ME & consumption posting in S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have a scenario for Alternate component consumption done in SAP ME POD and consumption posting should be happened in S/4 HANA system

Scenario:
I have created a Production Order in S4 where i have maintained Two components and enabled Alt. Material for each other with usage probability to 50% for each of them(for e.g., Production Order 10001 with Qty 10, where component A is required to consume 10, since  i have maintained Alt components enabled for Component A & B, I have maintained Component A Qty to 10 with usage probability to 50% and Component B Qty to 10 with usage probability to 50% ). The order has been released to SAP ME. As expected i could see both the components in POD Component Assembly screen - for each SFC, Component A having Qty to assemble as 1 and Component B having Qty to assemble as 1. Simultaneously I have maintained Component B as the Alternative Material to Component A in Material Maintenance - Alternatives Tab.

Now I request your help to achieve any of the below case:
Case #1: How can i post component B consumption to SAP and is it possible to ignore the Component A without consuming in SAP ME POD(without disabling CT520)?

Case #2: Is it possible to send the consumption of Component B request to SAP without adding the Component B as Alternative in BOM in SAP at Production Order Level but if the Alternative material is maintained in Material Maintenance in SAP ME.

If there's a standard solution, Please let me where can i do the changes in the SAP/MES. If there it can be achieved via custom solution, appreciate the approach.

Hoping someone might have already done this 😋 🤞

Thank You!

entry.title: Accumulated values for activation date not allowed in transfer year
entry.content:
Dear team,


While creating a legacy asset in AS91 with the following details:

  • Asset Number: 1200159
  • Company Code: 1301

However, while posting values in ABDLT, we are getting the below error.

We would like to create a legacy sub-asset in AS91. However, the sub-asset option is not appearing on the screen.

Could you please help us understand the reason for this issue and assist us in resolving it?
Also, please guide us on how to create a sub-asset through AS91.

Best regards,
Kishore

entry.title: How to create background job for PDS generation?
entry.content: Hi, can anyone help me create a background job for PDS generation on hourly or daily basis? I have searched several spaces and they mention to create variant first for /SAPAPO/CURTO_CREATE but I get error that this program does not exist.

entry.title: We are unable to settle the previous year’s AUC asset to the cost center
entry.content:
Dear Team,

It has been identified that the previous year’s AUC asset could not be settled to the designated cost center. The system is displaying the following error messages:

  • "Settlement of old asset data to receiver type CTR not allowed"
  • Message Class: AW
  • Message Number: 607

We have reviewed the SAP Notes (3621822 and 120253) suggested for this issue and followed the recommended steps. However, the same error persists.

Could you please suggest and provide a solution, For your reference, we have attached the relevant screenshot.

entry.title: ME28 can be used in 2025 SAP S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Please provide the information whether we can use ME28 in 2025 SAP S/4 HANA private cloud version.

currently we are in 2022 S4HANA Private cloud and want to upgrade to 2025 S4HANA Private cloud. So, ME28 transaction is still accessible or its obsolete.

Regards,

Tushar

entry.title: Usage of ME28 Transaction in S/4 HANA System
entry.content:
Dear Sir/Madam,

We currently have ME28 transaction being used by client users to release/approve multiple Purchase Orders, against a custom code, which is referred at the time of execution of ME28 txn. 

As the custom code checks eligibility for PO release individually for every user, and not just by Purch Org, Purch Group, etc, hence neither release strategy nor Flexible Workflow can be implemented for the client.

Considering the situation above, we wanted to understand if client can continue to use ME28 transaction code in the higher versions of S/4 HANA, as we plan to upgrade in near future. Client systems are currently at version 2022 Private Cloud Edition. 

Note - The above query is being asked as ME28 T-Code was referred as Obsolete or Deprecated in one of the Early Warning Alert Reports, along-with ME22, ME23, Request for quotation T-Codes. And we are aware that support is no longer provided for this T-Code as per KBA 3629920 - End of Support for transaction ME28 - SAP ERP & SAP S/4 HANA. So, we were wondering if any issue will be caused during upgrade in S/4 HANA.

Thanks & Best Regards.

entry.title: Large Technical Tables /AIF/PERS_XML
entry.content:
HI Team 

As part of RISE program SAP suggested the below recommendations

1.Transactions /AIF/MSG_DEL, /AIF/XML_COMPRESS , /AIF/PERS_DEL and report /AIF/MESSAGE_DELETION
2.Need to implement this SAP notes 2274361,2279909,3275559 to enable the required transactions-programs for compressing and deleting the XML messages
3.Only 3275559 note is revelent in our QAL system and can be implemented and the other 2 notes 2274361,2279909 are not applicable or not revelent
4.After applying the notes the given Tcodes, reports will be enabled.

Sine the given notes are not applicable could you please suggest the possible option or the correction notes to complet the recommendations

entry.title: Transitioning from SAP Business One to S/4HANA Consulting – Advice?
entry.content:
In my current role I work as an ERP Systems Analyst supporting SAP Business One across multiple entities.

My background is in finance, and I was previously involved in the ERP implementation migrating from Sage 50 to SAP Business One.

In my current role I work with SQL reporting, pricing structures, system configuration, and supporting business processes across finance, sales, and operations.

I’m interested in eventually moving towards working with SAP S/4HANA and consulting roles in the enterprise SAP ecosystem.

For those who have made a similar transition from SAP Business One or other ERP systems into S/4HANA consulting, what experience or steps helped you make that move?

Any advice would be appreciated. I'm based in the UK.

entry.title: procedure for creating the TM 121/543 return/consignment MIGO, referencing the delivery supplier
entry.content:
Subcontracting process.

 

There is a process where the main supplier for the order is not the same supplier for delivery, and in these cases the return MIGO, TM 121/543, must be with the delivery supplier.

Purchase order created with supplier 10173005 PORTO ALEGRE COM DE COMBUSTIVEIS LT and the deliverer is 10173065 REFINARIA MATARIPE SA.

When creating the MIGO transaction, subsequent debit (A11) does not create it with the delivery supplier and does not allow changes. We sought a solution by creating a pop-up in the MIGO transaction, and upon posting, the message is received.

BAdI: Field LIFNR not ready to accept input (Change will not be adopted)

Message No. MIGO050

We kindly request guidance on the procedure for creating the TM 121/543 return/consignment MIGO, referencing the delivery supplier.

entry.title: How to see the technical name of a field in Fiori
entry.content: How can I find the technical name of a particular field in Fiori?

entry.title: Debugging Application job on S/4Hana on Private Cloud using Eclipse ADT
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I have a class implementing interfaces 

 
INTERFACES if_apj_dt_exec_object .
    INTERFACES if_apj_rt_exec_object .

it means the job is to be executed from fiori app "Application jobs" using job template. The method  if_apj_rt_exec_object~execute
is running in background mode, so it will not stop when I place breakpoint in Eclipse ADT (with my user set as user for external break-point in properties:

I know that I can start debugging session from SM37, clicking on the finished job and using command "jdbg" however this way, I am stuck on SE80. Is there a way to switch with debugging session into Eclipse ADT debugger?

entry.title: QM Notification - "An inspection lot on sample plant already exists"
entry.content:
Hello Team

While Creating QM Notification we are facing this Error "An inspection lot on sample plant already exists".

The issue from Both Environment Quality and Production for some material. Currently I am doing testing in quality. The attachment also from quality.

I request to please check and share some solution to clear this error.

Thanks
